title: Bank Mandates
subtitle: SIGNATORY AUTHORIZATION RULES

list.empty_description: Start by creating a mandate for each bank account that needs voucher-based payment authorization.

composer.field_document_url_placeholder: Link to the executed mandate PDF
composer.rules_description: Define the signatory classes required on every voucher. For amount-tiered rules, use Step 3 to add thresholds.
composer.thresholds_description: Optional tiered rules: above a KWD threshold, require additional signatories. Skip this step if your tenant doesn't use tiered thresholds.
composer.review_active_hint: Default: mandate enters Pending bank acknowledgment. Flip this only if the bank has already acknowledged the mandate offline.
composer.error_rules_required: At least one signatory class is required.
composer.error_min_amount_required: Minimum amount is required for each tier.
composer.error_min_amount_format: Minimum amount must be a KWD decimal with up to 3 places.
composer.error_threshold_extra_required: Each tier needs at least one additional signatory class.
composer.error_document_url_format: Document URL must be a valid http(s) URL.
composer.error_generic: Could not create the mandate. Try again.

detail.signatories_none_current: No active signatories on this mandate yet.
detail.supersession_banner_body: Bank-mandate rules cannot be edited once issued (Kuwait banking convention). To modify signatory classes, counts, or thresholds, use Create replacement mandate to cancel this mandate and create a new authoritative one.

acknowledge_modal.title: Acknowledge mandate
acknowledge_modal.description: Confirm that the bank has acknowledged this mandate as active. This transitions the mandate from Pending to Active and makes it available to payment vouchers.
acknowledge_modal.field_acknowledged_at_hint: Defaults to now if left blank.
acknowledge_modal.field_note_placeholder: Short audit note, e.g. bank confirmation reference.
acknowledge_modal.error_generic: Could not acknowledge the mandate. Try again.

cancel_modal.title: Cancel mandate
cancel_modal.warning_terminal: Cancelling a mandate is terminal. It cannot be reactivated. To reuse similar rules, create a new mandate.
cancel_modal.warning_linked_vouchers_one: This mandate has {{count}} voucher linked to it. Cancelling will not invalidate existing vouchers, but new vouchers will require a different mandate.
cancel_modal.warning_linked_vouchers_other: This mandate has {{count}} vouchers linked to it. Cancelling will not invalidate existing vouchers, but new vouchers will require a different mandate.
cancel_modal.field_reason_placeholder: Audit-trail reason (e.g. account closed, updated rules).
cancel_modal.error_generic: Could not cancel the mandate. Try again.

assign_modal.title: Assign signatory
assign_modal.description: Bind a specific user to a signatory class on this mandate. Use the class dropdown to pick from common Kuwait banking classes or enter a custom class.
assign_modal.field_user_id_hint: The user ID from your team roster.
assign_modal.error_generic: Could not assign the signatory. Try again.

revoke_modal.title: Revoke signatory
revoke_modal.description: Revoking a signatory ends their authority on this mandate as of the effective-until date. The historical record is preserved for audit.
revoke_modal.field_revoked_reason_placeholder: Short reason, e.g. role transition, termination.
revoke_modal.error_generic: Could not revoke the signatory. Try again.

role_readonly_banner: You have read-only access to bank mandates. Only the Owner can create, acknowledge, cancel, or manage signatories.
